item.title: Mac SD Cards Data Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac SD Cards Data Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac SD Cards Data Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Professionally designed files revival application for memory card is easily accessible offers perfect solution for instant revival of mistakenly erased audio/video clips from accidentally formatted XD card storage media. Extraordinary Mac Memory Card Recovery software provides easy way to rescue valuable office document data that are damaged because of accidental deletion, software/hardware malfunction, power failure, disk corruption, improper device handling, virus/worm attack etc in cost effective manner.

[read more]

item.title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]

The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.

The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]

item.title: Mac Memory Card Data Recovery tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Memory Card Data Recovery tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Memory Card Data Recovery tool
(Utilities)
Recover Mac Data Memory Card software helps user to revive all lost video, audio, photos, images, music files and other crucial data from memory card. Mac memory card data recovery program facilitates user to revive and restore recover lost data from formatted or reformatted memory card. www.recovermac.us provides advantage to recovers data from different types of memory cards including SDHC card, mini SD card, compact flash card, digital picture card, multimedia card, memory sticks ,micro SD card ,micro drives ,smart media etc. Professional MAC data recovery application helps user to easily restore all missing, erased, deleted or lost data deleted due to virus infected memory card, damaged memory card, improper use of memory card or any other logical error. Data recovery from MAC memory card application offers fast restoration of all types of file saved in various graphical formats including jpg, jpeg, bmp, gif, avi, mp3, png and other. Memory card data revival tool provides advantage to preview all the deleted or missing data before performing the actual recovery. Mac multimedia card data recovery software helps user to easily get back all the deleted data even if drive not formatted message is displayed on the computer system. MAC data recovery program for memory card provides reliable and cost effective way to recover all essential data in minimal time and efforts.Features:* MAC data recovery from memory card tool provides inbuilt graphical user interface helps user to easily understand the working features of the software.* Professional MAC data recovery application helps user to regains all lost audio, video, images and picture files without special technical support.* Mac memory card data recovery program offers read only and non-destructive application helps user to recover all the deleted data in less time.

[read more]
item.description:
Mac Memory Card Data Recovery tool
(Utilities)
Recover Mac Data Memory Card software helps user to revive all lost video, audio, photos, images, music files and other crucial data from memory card. Memory card data revival tool provides advantage to preview all the deleted or missing data before performing the actual recovery. MAC data recovery program for memory card provides reliable and cost effective way to recover all essential data in minimal time and efforts.Features:* MAC data recovery from memory card tool provides inbuilt graphical user interface helps user to easily understand the working features of the software.* Professional MAC data recovery application helps user to regains all lost audio, video, images and picture files without special technical support.* Mac memory card data recovery program offers read only and non-destructive application helps user to recover all the deleted data in less time.

[read more]

item.title: Weeom Lotus Notes Notes to Outlook Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Weeom Lotus Notes Notes to Outlook Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:author: deepakweeom
item.itunes:summary:
Weeom Lotus Notes Notes to Outlook Converter Software
(File Management)
Lotus Notes is one of the most predominantly used email clients that offers many premium features to users. NSF is a database file for saving the entire Lotus Notes data. However, the ease of using Outlook makes Lotus Notes users switch towards them. Similar to Lotus Notes, Outlook also uses a database file, which is known as a PST file, to store its complete data.
If users want to switch from their current platform to Outlook, then the need to convert NSF to PST files arises in order to get their older data into Outlook. In this small write-up, we will be sharing the solution to make the conversion easy.

Methods to convert NSF files to PST

Yes, there are many ways through which users can convert NSF to PST files, but that will not be a direct or one-way conversation. Users have to first export the data from their NSF files to CSV and then import CSV into PST files. This will be a time-consuming method and also many users would not be comfortable using it.

In addition to that, there are multiple other drawbacks of the manual conversion methods. So, looking to another solution is the right step which users need to look for.

Reliable NSF to PST conversion Software

There is an alternative to it, which is the third-party conversion tool. Weeom NSF to PST converter tool is one solution that will make it easier for users to convert their multiple NSF files concurrently. This software is easier to use, and one of the best part of this software is that it comes with an incremental export option. Due to this option, the tool starts resuming the stopped conversion by only processing the newer data.

• The software allows to convert the NSF files whole making to sustain the meta-properties of every item of the NSF file items.
• Users can utilize the data filter option of this tool which assists them in making the conversion of the NSF file with the required data.
• Users can review the data before they start converting their added NSF files in the software preview pane.
• The folder mapping option is also part of the software, where users can select the folder from the source NSF file and map it with the Outlook folder.
• It also allows users to add multiple mailboxes directly from the Domino server.
• Its search facility helps users to locate the required NSF files.
• The software is compatible working with all versions of the Lotus Notes Client as well as with the Windows OS.

Summing Up

Conversion of the NSF files to the PST file is easier for those lacking good technical knowledge. However, using the manual solution to convert NSF to PST files is a cucumber job, but there is a better alternative that allows novice users to use it easily. To use the software functioning, users can utilize the free version of the software.

[read more]

Lotus Notes is one of the most predominantly used email clients that offers many premium features to users. NSF is a database file for saving the entire Lotus Notes data. However, the ease of using Outlook makes Lotus Notes users switch towards them. Similar to Lotus Notes, Outlook also uses a database file, which is known as a PST file, to store its complete data.
If users want to switch from their current platform to Outlook, then the need to convert NSF to PST files arises in order to get their older data into Outlook. In this small write-up, we will be sharing the solution to make the conversion easy.

Yes, there are many ways through which users can convert NSF to PST files, but that will not be a direct or one-way conversation. Users have to first export the data from their NSF files to CSV and then import CSV into PST files. This will be a time-consuming method and also many users would not be comfortable using it.

In addition to that, there are multiple other drawbacks of the manual conversion methods. So, looking to another solution is the right step which users need to look for.

item.content:encoded:
Weeom Lotus Notes Notes to Outlook Converter Software
(File Management)
Lotus Notes is one of the most predominantly used email clients that offers many premium features to users. NSF is a database file for saving the entire Lotus Notes data. However, the ease of using Outlook makes Lotus Notes users switch towards them. Similar to Lotus Notes, Outlook also uses a database file, which is known as a PST file, to store its complete data.
If users want to switch from their current platform to Outlook, then the need to convert NSF to PST files arises in order to get their older data into Outlook. In this small write-up, we will be sharing the solution to make the conversion easy.

Methods to convert NSF files to PST

Yes, there are many ways through which users can convert NSF to PST files, but that will not be a direct or one-way conversation. Users have to first export the data from their NSF files to CSV and then import CSV into PST files. This will be a time-consuming method and also many users would not be comfortable using it.

In addition to that, there are multiple other drawbacks of the manual conversion methods. So, looking to another solution is the right step which users need to look for.

Reliable NSF to PST conversion Software

There is an alternative to it, which is the third-party conversion tool. Weeom NSF to PST converter tool is one solution that will make it easier for users to convert their multiple NSF files concurrently. This software is easier to use, and one of the best part of this software is that it comes with an incremental export option. Due to this option, the tool starts resuming the stopped conversion by only processing the newer data.

• The software allows to convert the NSF files whole making to sustain the meta-properties of every item of the NSF file items.
• Users can utilize the data filter option of this tool which assists them in making the conversion of the NSF file with the required data.
• Users can review the data before they start converting their added NSF files in the software preview pane.
• The folder mapping option is also part of the software, where users can select the folder from the source NSF file and map it with the Outlook folder.
• It also allows users to add multiple mailboxes directly from the Domino server.
• Its search facility helps users to locate the required NSF files.
• The software is compatible working with all versions of the Lotus Notes Client as well as with the Windows OS.

Summing Up

Conversion of the NSF files to the PST file is easier for those lacking good technical knowledge. However, using the manual solution to convert NSF to PST files is a cucumber job, but there is a better alternative that allows novice users to use it easily. To use the software functioning, users can utilize the free version of the software.

item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Software For Mac
(Utilities)
Convenient image restoration application salvages erased crucial data from macintosh compact flash card in minimal time and efforts. Mac Memory Card Recovery software is available at www.recovermac.us that empowers user to regain all mistakenly deleted valuable picture gallery from apple based secure digital card in few countable steps. Looking for best revival program? Download Mac Memory Card Recovery application from company website www.recovermac.us that offers latest disk scanning technique to restore misplaced video clips, songs from apple based multimedia card.

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]

It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]

[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:

item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]

[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

[read more]
item.description:
Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

[read more]

Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

item.title: Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
Mac Photo Recovery Program search and quickly regains deleted, lost or missing photographs, pictures, videos from your digital camera memory card using in-built disk scanning mechanism. Successfully restore corrupted clicks images and recorded video clipping from virus infected digital camera memory with the help of Professional Digital camera recovery software. Mac Data Restoration Application helps to bring out formatted or corrupted photos from digicam memory card.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
Mac Photo Recovery Program search and quickly regains deleted, lost or missing photographs, pictures, videos from your digital camera memory card using in-built disk scanning mechanism. Successfully restore corrupted clicks images and recorded video clipping from virus infected digital camera memory with the help of Professional Digital camera recovery software. Mac Data Restoration Application helps to bring out formatted or corrupted photos from digicam memory card.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
Mac Photo Recovery Program search and quickly regains deleted, lost or missing photographs, pictures, videos from your digital camera memory card using in-built disk scanning mechanism. Successfully restore corrupted clicks images and recorded video clipping from virus infected digital camera memory with the help of Professional Digital camera recovery software. Mac Data Restoration Application helps to bring out formatted or corrupted photos from digicam memory card.

[read more]

item.itunes:summary:
Professional Mac Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Recover Mac Data Software revives corrupted data files, images and documents from jump drives in Mac devices in few minutes without any guidance. www.recovermac.us refers Restoration program that helps in regaining damage files from Macintosh in few mouse clicks and with no knowledge of technical guidance.
